Game.Name: Hit the Ice - VHL - The Official Video Hockey League (USA)
Game.plot: This radical hockey game pits you and your team against some of the toughest skaters ever to burn a hole in the ice! Victory goes to the team that kicks, punches, and high-sticks its opponent into slush. Standard hockey rules apply, plus a few surprises to stir things up. So lace on your skates and fasten your face mask--hockey is about to break loose!
